body:
## BREAKING CHANGES

Renamed the packages:
- `@base-ui-components/react` to `@base-ui/react`
- `@base-ui-components/utils` to `@base-ui/utils`

The changes are done using find replace, the only reverted change is the one listed below in the TODOs.

TODOs (after publishing):
- [x] Update examples/vite-css to use the new org once the package is published, currently it fails as the latest tag for @base-ui/react does not exists on npm
- [x] Deprecate https://www.npmjs.com/package/@base-ui-components/react and point to https://www.npmjs.com/package/@base-ui/react
title: [core] Rename packages to use the @base-ui org
